name: Thumbnail
description: Renders a rasterized SVG thumbnail via image-extractor — the sibling of thumbnail/renderer.json, split out because file-type detects SVG's signature as generic application/xml (confirmed empirically) rather than an image/* MIME, which classifies it binary_category "other" rather than "image" under this project's existing MIME-category classifier. Same tab name, same underlying extractor as thumbnail — this manifest exists only because of that classification quirk, not because SVG renders any differently once matched.
